comments.author: Milan Kumar
comments.body:
Initial investigation started.
Registration logs have been collected for analysis.

comments.author: Milan Kumar
comments.body:
Root cause identified.
Registration delay was caused by a temporary service timeout.
Issue verified and ready to close.

comments.author: Milan Kumar
comments.body:
Post-closure verification completed.
The service is responding normally and device registration time is within the expected range.
No further action is required.

comments.author: Milan Kumar
comments.body:
Additional verification completed.
Verified the device registration flow after ticket closure.
No functional issue was observed during re-validation.
Updating the ticket for testing the Jira to Git synchronization.

comments.author: Milan Kumar
comments.body:
Investigation completed.
Supply event processing delay was caused by a temporary queue backlog. The queue was processed successfully and events are now received as expected.
Issue verified and ready to close.
